productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Brown Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this oxford makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with a raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
